title: Simultaneous second derivative spectrophotmnetric determination of nickel(II) and copper(II) in alloys using diacetylmonoxime benzoylhydrazone (DMBH)
author: K. B. Chandrasekhar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, College of Engineering, 

 Anantapur-515 002, India 

 Department of Chemistry, Sri Krishnadevaraya University, Anantapur-515 003, India 

  Fax :  91-08554-29043 

  Manuscript received 18 December 2001, revised 17 March 2003, accepted 7 May 2003  

 Diacetylmonoxime benzoyl hydrazone (DMBH) reagent has been used for the determination of Ni ll  and Cu ll  by spectropho­tometric method. The reagent provides intense yellow colour reaction with Ni  II   and Cu ll  in basic medium. The maximum colour intensity is observed in pH range 8.0-10.0. The compositions of nickel and copper complexes of DMBH as determined by Job's and molar ratio methods are 1 : 2 and 1 : 1 (M : L) respectively. Simultaneous spectrophotometric determination of Ni  II   and Cu ll  was carried out by measuring the peak-base line technique at 422.5 and 450 mm respectively. Beer's law is obeyed in the range 0.12-2.4 and 0.125-2.5 µg/mI of Ni II  and Cu II  respectively. The method is carried out without the need for employing simultaneous equation in the determination of Ni II  and Cu ll  in synthetic mixtures and alloys.
